rulings.Case Title: FOGHORN REALTY INC. VS. CALEB YI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Foghorn Realty Inc.'S Motion For Summary Judgment Against Defendant Caleb Yi Dba Pinix Realty.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 1, 2018, Line 1. Plaintiff Foghorn Realty Inc.'s Motion For Summary Judgment Against Defendant Caleb Yi Dba Pinix Realty. GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party failed to create a triable issue of material fact with competent admissible evidence. Fact 16, while disputed and supported by evidence, is not a material fact as to the cause of action for breach of contract. It is cited in support of argument regarding laches, which is not a proper defense in this action for money damages and no evidence of prejudice provided. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: FERNANDO ARTIGA VS. HAWK LING LOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint For Damages To Substitute Real Parties In Interest As Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 1, 2018, Line 2. PLAINTIFF FERNANDO ARTIGA'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint For Damages To Substitute Real Parties In Interest As Plaintiffs. GRANTED. Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. The Court is not making a determination regarding applicability of relation back doctrine to the new plaintiffs at this time. Parties are encouraged to meet and confer regarding trial continuance forthwith. =(501/ACM)
